overview.title: BPO / ITO Overview
overview.p1: BPO and ITO help enterprises focus on core business and improve operational efficiency. We offer end-to-end outsourcing across customer service, data processing, software development, and system operations.
overview.p2: With experienced teams and standardized processes, we deliver high-quality, cost-effective solutions via offshore, nearshore, and onshore models.

bpo.title: Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)
bpo.intro: Outsource non-core processes to lower operating costs.

ito.title: IT Outsourcing (ITO)
ito.intro: Outsource IT services to enhance capabilities.
